query: As of July 2026, what is the financial/bankruptcy status of Beyond Meat Inc? Has it filed for Chapter 11 or restructured debt? Any bankruptcy warnings, going concern doubts, debt restructuring, or imminent bankruptcy risk in 2025-2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on Beyond Meat's financial/bankruptcy status as of July 2026:

**No bankruptcy filing, but severe distress + an already-executed distressed debt restructuring:**

1. **No Chapter 11 filing** — Beyond Meat has not filed and has repeatedly, publicly denied imminent bankruptcy. Third-party warnings (Creditsafe via TheStreet) flagged Chapter 11 risk, but these are analyst warnings, not filings.

2. **Debt restructuring ALREADY DONE (Oct 2025)** — This is the critical fact. The company completed a convertible-note exchange formally classified as a **"troubled debt restructuring."** It swapped ~97% of its ~$1.15B of 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 for ~$209M of new 7.00% secured notes due 2030 plus ~317M new shares. This eliminated **$800M+ of debt**, pushed maturity from 2027 to 2030, and generated a ~$548.7M accounting gain — meaningfully reducing near-term default risk at the cost of huge dilution.

3. **Ongoing operating distress** — Q1 2026 revenue $58.2M (–15.3% YoY), volumes –19.5%, gross margin just 3.4%, net loss $28.5M. FY2025 revenue $275.5M (–15.6%), operating loss $332.7M. Cash was $117.3M (June 2025). Target: positive adjusted EBITDA by H2 2026.

4. **Nasdaq delisting risk** — Deficiency letter March 4, 2026 (below $1 for 30 days); compliance deadline Aug 31, 2026; reverse split under consideration.

5. **Stock** — ~$0.67 on July 9, 2026; down ~91% from its 52-week high of $7.69; market cap ~$344M.

The full markdown report and structured `ResearchFindings` (key facts, data points, and sources) have been delivered.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Announces Final Tender Results and Final Settlement for Exchange Offer
sources.snippet: 97.16% of 2027 notes tendered; $209.176M new 2030 Notes and 316,926,786 New Shares issued; $32.659M of 2027 notes remain outstanding.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Launches Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation Intended to Eliminate Over $800 Million of Debt
sources.snippet: Sept 29, 2025 launch of exchange to eliminate over $800M of debt with noteholder support.

sources.title: Beyond Meat posts 2025 loss, books debt gain | BYND 8-K Filing
sources.snippet: 2025 revenue fell 15.6% to $275.5M with a $332.7M operating loss, offset by a $548.7M debt restructuring gain; 10-K filing delay.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 net revenues $58.2M, down 15.3% YoY; volumes fell 19.5%; gross margin 3.4%; adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed to $27.8M; net loss $28.5M.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Q1 2026 results
sources.snippet: Volumes fell 19.5%; foodservice volumes fell over 30% globally; strategy shift from meat mimicry to plant protein; high-protein drinks launch.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Denies Bankruptcy Rumors, CEO Vows to Achieve Positive EBITDA by 2026
sources.snippet: Company cited $117.3M cash balance and goal of positive EBITDA operations by second half of 2026.

sources.title: Analyst: Beyond Meat faces Chapter 11 bankruptcy as cash dwindles
sources.snippet: Creditsafe flagged Chapter 11 bankruptcy risk; cash $117.3M and total debt $1.2B as of June 28, 2025; bulk from 2021 convertible bonds maturing 2027.

sources.title: No, Beyond Meat Has Not Filed for Bankruptcy
sources.snippet: Beyond Meat vehemently denied media reports alleging bankruptcy filing amid falling sales.

sources.title: Beyond Meat receives delisting warning as share prices fall
sources.snippet: Nasdaq deficiency letter for trading below $1 for 30 consecutive business days; compliance deadline August 31, 2026.

sources.title: Is a Reverse Stock Split Coming for Beyond Meat?
sources.snippet: Beyond Meat, once >$230/share, now fighting for survival; reverse split under consideration.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Faces Nasdaq Delisting Risk, Eyes Reverse Split
sources.snippet: Company facing Nasdaq delisting risk and considering a reverse stock split.

sources.title: Beyond Meat 10-Q Note on Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation (Q3 2025)
sources.snippet: Details exchange of 2027 Notes for 2030 Notes and shares; early settlement Oct 15, 2025 and final settlement Oct 30, 2025.

sources.title: Beyond Meat faces new financial woes, Chapter 11 bankruptcy risk
sources.snippet: Continuing demand challenges; US retail sales for some plant-based formats down 17%.

sources.title: Beyond Products Expand to 2,000+ Walmart Stores
sources.snippet: Oct 21, 2025 expansion of select products to over 2,000 Walmart stores including Beyond Burger 6-Pack.
